results.title: Best Unitpay Alternatives & Competitors
results.content: Inswitch   Inswitch Platform is a cloud-native, modular embedded-finance platform that enables any company to integrate banking, payments, wallet, card-issuing, and cross-border money-services capabilities via a single API. It supports core banking and digital wallets (top-ups, bill payments), pay-in/pay-out and alternative payments, virtual and physical card programs (with real-time authorization controls and white-label branding), and multi-currency transactions with global reach across Latin America, the U.S., and beyond. Included in-platform features are built-in compliance and security (KYC/KYB, AML, fraud management), real-time settlement and reconciliation, business-intelligence dashboards, smart orchestration of financial flows, and a business portal for managing branded channels, [...] Access your transaction history on a centralized dashboard, with daily reconciliation for visibility and easy reporting. Better yet, pay as you go with competitive pricing and no hidden fees or surprises.    Starting Price: $0.32 Fee  Compare vs. UnitpayView Software [...] PayMongo   Give your customers a payment experience they’ll love. Give yourself tools for success. All with one PayMongo account. Collect one-time payments through Viber, Messenger, Instagram, SMS or anywhere you talk to your customer. An always-on payment page, custom-made for your business' product or service. Add PayMongo to your eCommerce platform of choice to collect credit card and e-wallet payments. Integrate payments into your projects, from small side gigs to complex products and services for millions of customers. Track your customer payments in real-time. No more waiting for screenshots of receipts. Our risk engine uses 1,600+ data points to predict and fight fraudsters in real-time. Generate payment and payout reports with VAT and withholding tax computation built-in. Our

Setapp [...] A lot of the vision behind UnitPay comes from our founder, Vijay, who saw firsthand how AI teams were spending months building billing instead of building their products. That experience became the foundation for everything we've built.

Our goal is simple. We want to make monetisation feel effortless so builders can spend their time creating great products.

If you've checked us out today, thank you. Every upvote, comment, and bit of feedback means a lot to our team.

We'll be here all day answering questions and listening to your feedback. We'd genuinely love to hear what you think and what you'd like to see next. 💚

FAQ

## Questions we get asked.

We ingest events via a high-throughput REST API with sub-12ms p99 latency. Events are automatically deduplicated, so you can fire and forget from your AI agents. No batching or queuing logic needed on your side.

Yes. UnitPay connects to your existing Stripe account. You keep your payment relationships and customer data. We add usage metering, flexible pricing, and revenue intelligence on top.

# DailyPayAlternatives

An alternative to DailyPay is another embedded-finance and banking-infrastructure vendor to compare for APIs, go-to-market story, and customer proof. We list 10 peers here so you can shortlist without building a full market map from scratch. It is like comparing analytics tools: the category is shared, but depth, regions, and pricing differ.

## Looking for DailyPayAlternatives?

DailyPayis a leading embedded finance platform offering earned wage access, paymentssolutions.Earned wage access platform with $500M+ raised and 180+ pre-built integrations with payroll, HCM, and workforce management systems for on-demand pay....
